title: Tempting Yeasty French Beef Pot Au Feu
description: A hearty and flavorful French stew featuring Thai green curry paste, served with crusty bread for a festive meal. This Mediterranean-friendly dish is perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef short ribs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the Thai green curry paste and yeast extract, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, red wine, and beef broth, and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven, and cook for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the pot from the oven and let cool slightly.
Serve the pot au feu hot, with crusty bread on the side.
